name: Strawberry Cream Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the strawberries and mix with sour cream.
2. Process the mixture briefly in a food processor or blender until smooth.
3. Add vanilla extract and powdered sugar; process until well blended.
4. Pour into a bowl and stir in half and half until fully incorporated.
5. Chill the soup. Serves 6.
6. To make croutons, cut pound cake into cubes and toast under the broiler until lightly browned (optional).
